title: chabraea runcinata
intro: Chabraea runcinata, also known as Indian snake root, is a plant species that belongs to the family Gentianaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Chabraea runcinata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat various infections. Chabraea runcinata can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or powder, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health issues.
